patch:
--- a/mux_logic.v
+++ b/mux_logic.v
@@ -1,14 +1,14 @@
 module priority_mux_32bit(
   input [31:0] data_x,
   input [31:0] data_y,
   input [31:0] data_z,
   input sel_xy,
   output reg [31:0] mux_out
 );
 
-  always @(sel_xy) begin
+  always @(data_x or data_y or data_z or sel_xy) begin
     if (sel_xy)
       mux_out = data_x;
     else
       mux_out = data_y | data_z;
   end
 
 endmodule
